name: Claude Code Skills & Agent Plugins
description: A collection of 232+ skills and agent plugins designed for Claude Code and multiple other coding agents including Codex, Gemini CLI, and Cursor, enabling enhanced capabilities across engineering, marketing, product management, compliance, and C-level advisory domains.

inputs.name: agent_input
inputs.description: The input text, command, or request provided to the coding agent to trigger the relevant skill or plugin.

inputs.name: context_data
inputs.description: Associated contextual information relevant to the task such as project details, user role, or domain-specific parameters.

outputs.name: agent_response
outputs.description: The output or result generated by the skill or plugin, responding to the initial input with actionable information, code snippets, advisories, or task automation.

patterns: Modular plugin architecture enabling multi-agent interoperability
Domain-specialized skill encapsulation for engineering, marketing, compliance, and executive advice
Prompt engineering across various coding assistant frameworks
Multi-agent skill sharing and invocation pattern
steps: Receive input request from supported coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, etc.)
Parse and identify the appropriate skill or plugin based on input context and intent
Execute the matched skill plugin, utilizing domain-specific logic for engineering, marketing, product, or compliance tasks
Generate and return a response or output tailored to the input and agent environment
Allow chaining or combination of skills/plugins for complex workflows
use_cases: Automated code generation and refactoring across multiple AI coding assistants
Providing marketing strategy recommendations and product management insights via AI agents
Ensuring compliance and regulatory adherence through automated advisory plugins
Facilitating C-level decision support with tailored executive advice integrated in coding environments

prompt_templates.name: code_generation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate code to perform the following task: {task_description}

prompt_templates.name: compliance_check_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Check the following process for regulatory compliance: {process_description}

prompt_templates.name: product_management_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the product requirements and suggest improvements: {requirements_details}

prompt_templates.name: c_level_advisory_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Advise on the following executive decision: {decision_context}
